creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: What does Compositing and Audio Backend in about:support say? Can you check if the crashes are related to Stylo via layout.css.servo.enabled or multi-process windows via browser.tabs.remote.autostart.2 disable in about:config ? And try to get backtrace of the crashed process: for non-debug symbols define STRIP= (empty) or select either DTRACE or PROFILE, for debug symbols set CFLAGS+=-g + STRIP= (empty) or just select DEBUG.
